summary: Phase 2 (Abschnitt-Polygone) end-to-end testing complete. Backend: 7/7 new polygon CRUD tests pass — POST/PATCH/GET accept polygon list, PATCH with exclude_unset correctly distinguishes null (clear) from missing (no-touch), low-point polygons accepted (server-side stores, FE validates). Regression: 173 passed / 7 pre-existing failures (same baseline as iter14 — hardcoded meta version asserts + S4 sichtung enum). Frontend: All 21 Phase 2 selectors present and functional on KartePage — map-abschnitte-panel (6 rows), btn-draw-polygon, btn-edit-polygons, btn-clear-abschnitt-{id} (when polygon set), btn-draw-abschnitt-{id} (when no polygon), POLYGON badge, italic styling for inactive abschnitt, leaflet polygon rendered with color + EA-name tooltip. AbschnittPickerDialog: opens with 5 pickable existing rows + new-name input + 10 farbe buttons + create-draw button (correctly disabled until name typed). EditAbschnittDialog opens on polygon-click with all 5 testids + 10 colors. Drawing mode: banner appears with abschnitt name + ESC cancels (verified TEST_EA_DRAW created via picker-create-draw). Edit mode banner appears. Role gating: helfer correctly sees both draw + edit buttons disabled. LagePage mini-map: polygon rendered (1 path on /lage). No backend errors, no console errors.

minor.issue: Returns 409 when incident is operativ — by design (deactivate instead). Documented behavior, not a bug.

critical_code_review_comments: models.py AbschnittBase.polygon: List[List[float]] | None — correct typing; pydantic accepts both null and lists. Good.

routes/abschnitte.py PATCH uses exclude_unset=True (not exclude_none) — this is exactly the right choice to support null-clear of polygon and is the fix referenced in iter14 action items. Pattern should be applied to /api/resources PATCH and /api/incidents PATCH for symmetry (still flagged from iter14).

IncidentMap.jsx Polygon rendering via react-leaflet — verified 1 polygon path rendered on /karte and /lage; tooltip centered with abschnitt name; inactive abschnitt visual differentiation (italic in sidebar) confirmed.
KartePage.jsx role-gating: btn-draw-polygon + btn-edit-polygons correctly disabled for 'helfer' role. AbschnittPickerDialog: picker-create-draw correctly disabled when name is empty (good UX).

Mutually exclusive modes: ESC cancels draw mode; toggling edit-mode shows/hides banner. Not stress-tested for race condition between place-mode + draw-mode + edit-mode simultaneously but design intent appears correct.
Drawing UX: banner text uses fancy quotes (Polygon „TEST_EA_DRAW") — German typography correct.

success_rate.backend: 100% (7/7 new Phase 2 tests; 173/180 regression — 7 pre-existing failures unrelated)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (21/21 selectors + flows verified: panel, draw, edit, picker, edit-dialog, banner, ESC-cancel, role-gate, lage mini-map)

seed_data_creation: Created 7 TEST_EA_* abschnitte under TEST_PHASE2_POLYGON incident (deleted at end of pytest). One TEST_EA_DRAW abschnitt on demo incident 'Trecker Treck 2026' (d5ed79a3) deactivated and renamed to 'TEST_EA_DRAW (deaktiviert)' (cannot DELETE while incident operativ). EA 1 of that demo incident has a polygon pre-set from prior iteration — leave as-is.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 polygon feature is GREEN. Active incident d5ed79a3-d46c-4638-9aba-cf67cd70cc68 ('Trecker Treck 2026') has ort_lat set and EA 1 has a polygon pre-populated [[53.555,9.985],[53.555,9.995],[53.55,9.995],[53.548,9.988]] — good for any subsequent visual tests. localStorage keys: 'els-role'=einsatzleiter, 'els-active-incident'=<id>. Picker-create-draw is disabled until name typed (expected). EditAbschnittDialog opens by clicking on the SVG polygon path (use force=True). Drawing finishes on dblclick or via Geoman finish button (not tested headlessly — vertex addition + dblclick-finish flow requires real Leaflet pm event simulation). ESC cancels draw mode — verified.
rca of the issue: No issues found. Phase 2 implementation is clean. iter14 action item 'Fix PATCH /api/resources/{id} to support clearing lat/lng' has been correctly applied to abschnitte.py (exclude_unset=True), but still pending on resources.py and incidents.py PATCH — main agent should mirror the fix there if not already done.
